title: tribulocarpus somalensis
intro: Tribulocarpus somalensis is a flowering plant species native to East Africa, specifically found in Somalia and parts of Ethiopia. It is also known as the "calotropis" or "devil's milk." Tribulocarpus somalensis has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits such as improved cardiovascular health and immune system function. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and extracts, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal uses.
